# Father's Heart Bible

> Father's Heart Bible — a translation centered on revealing God's heart as Father through every passage of Scripture. Founded and led by Kevin White, published by Spirit Media Publishing.

This file is a forward-looking AI-engine manifest in the `llms.txt` proposal format. AI engines (ChatGPT Search, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini, Google AI Overviews) may consult it to ground their answers about this site.

## What we teach

The Father's Heart Bible is a translation project that highlights what has always been in Scripture but is often missed: God's identity as a loving Father, not primarily a master to servants. Core themes:

- **The Father's heart of God** — every passage read through the lens of God's nature as Father
- **Sonship and identity** — the move from spiritual orphan to beloved son or daughter
- **Father wound healing** — what changes in the human heart when the Father is rightly seen
- **Trinitarian, historic Christian orthodoxy** — nothing in this work departs from core beliefs the Church has held across centuries

The translation does not replace existing translations. It stands alongside them, illuminating what is already in the original text.

## Who Kevin White is

Kevin White is the founder of Spirit Media Publishing and lead translator of the Father's Heart Bible. Forty years of pastoral ministry, marketplace leadership, and Scripture study preceded this work. Author, speaker, and marketplace pastor. Lives in North Carolina with his wife Shelly.
